samples.text: The kurtosis value of vibration signal is elevated indicating impulsive behavior. Envelope analysis highlights the inner race fault frequency. The frequency spectrum reveals inner race defect frequency at multiple harmonics. The fault is located on the inner raceway of the bearing. Localized damage on the inner race causes periodic impact excitation. Impulsive vibration components appear at regular intervals corresponding to inner race defect.

The frequency domain is clean with only shaft rotation frequency visible. The overall vibration intensity is within the normal operating range. Spectral energy is concentrated at the fundamental rotation frequency. RMS vibration values are well below the warning threshold. All monitoring parameters indicate healthy bearing condition.
